case_title: MISRACK, MAURY L. M.D. vs. SALAPOUR, MOHAMMED et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SALAPOUR, MOHAMMED

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $129.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISRACK, MAURY L. M.D. AS TO DEFENDANT SALAPOUR, MOHAMMED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISRACK, MAURY L. M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAPOUR, MOHAMMED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2235 BROADWAY APT #8, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISRACK, MAURY L. M.D.

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $129.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISRACK, MAURY L. M.D. AS TO DEFENDANT SALAPOUR, MOHAMMED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISRACK, MAURY L. M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAPOUR, MOHAMMED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON AUGUST 10, 1994 $1,600.00 RENT, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $129.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,154.50, LEASE FORFEITED
